name: Town Square
description: You stand in the heart of a small frontier town. Cobblestones stretch beneath your feet, worn smooth by countless travelers. A weathered fountain gurgles at the center, its water dark and cold. Buildings crowd the edges — a tavern to the north, a general store to the east, and a shadowed alley to the south. The town gate lies to the west.

exitPreviews.north: The warm glow of lantern light spills from the tavern's windows. You can hear the faint sound of laughter and a bard's melody.
exitPreviews.east: Through the general store's window, you glimpse shelves packed with goods. A hand-painted sign hangs above the door.
exitPreviews.south: The alley mouth yawns like a dark throat between two buildings. Cold air seems to seep from its depths.
exitPreviews.west: The sturdy town gate stands open. Beyond it, you see the road winding toward distant hills and forest.

name: The Rusty Flagon Tavern
description: Warmth and the smell of roasting meat wash over you as you step inside. The tavern is dimly lit by oil lamps hanging from low rafters. A bard strums a melancholy tune in the corner. The barkeep polishes a glass behind a scarred wooden counter. A staircase leads up to the rooms above.

name: Tavern - Upper Rooms
description: A narrow hallway with three doors. The floorboards creak under your weight. A dusty window at the end lets in pale light. Most doors are locked, but one stands slightly ajar.

name: General Store
description: Shelves line every wall, crammed with an eclectic assortment of goods — rope, lanterns, dried provisions, and curious trinkets. The air smells of leather and sawdust. A glass display case holds a few items of particular interest.

name: Dark Alley
description: The alley narrows quickly, flanked by crumbling brick walls slick with moisture. Refuse litters the ground. The shadows here feel almost alive. Something skitters in the darkness ahead. A passage continues south to the old cemetery.

exitPreviews.north: The town square's fountain is visible at the alley's mouth. Sunlight seems impossibly bright from here.
exitPreviews.south: Ahead, crooked headstones rise above overgrown grass. A low mist creeps along the ground toward you.

name: Old Cemetery
description: Crooked headstones jut from overgrown earth like broken teeth. A low mist clings to the ground. An ancient iron fence surrounds the grounds, its gate hanging by one hinge. The air is cold and still. Something feels deeply wrong here.

name: Crypt Entrance
description: A heavy stone door, partially open, reveals stairs descending into darkness. Cold air rises from below, carrying the scent of damp earth and something older. Faded runes are carved into the lintel above.

name: Town Gate
description: The town gate is a sturdy wooden structure reinforced with iron bands. Beyond it, a dirt road winds through rolling hills toward the distant forest. Guards lean against the walls, looking bored. A notice board stands beside the gate, covered in postings.

name: Forest Path
description: Tall oaks and elms arch overhead, their branches intertwined to form a green canopy. Dappled sunlight filters through the leaves. The path is narrow but well-worn. Birdsong fills the air, though it grows quieter the deeper you go. The path splits ahead — north toward a clearing, south into deeper woods.

exitPreviews.east: The town gate is visible through the trees. You can see guards leaning against the walls.
exitPreviews.north: Sunlight brightens the path ahead. Through the trees, you glimpse a peaceful clearing dotted with wildflowers.
exitPreviews.south: The forest grows darker and denser. Ancient tree trunks disappear into shadow. Something feels watching.

name: Forest Clearing
description: A peaceful circular clearing bathed in sunlight. Wildflowers dot the tall grass. A moss-covered stone sits at the center — perhaps an old altar or waymarker. The trees form a natural wall around this serene place.

name: Deep Woods
description: The forest grows dark and dense. Ancient trees tower above, their trunks wider than a man's armspan. Strange fungi glow faintly on rotting logs. The undergrowth is thick and the air humid. Something watches from the shadows.
